title: hibbertia emarginata
intro: Hibbertia emarginata, also known as the fringe honey flower, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dilleniaceae. Traditionally, the leaves of Hibbertia emarginata have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-modulating effects. Hibbertia emarginata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in topical applications for its wound-healing properties.
